text.title: JS/TS Frontend Testing Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the code artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints + forbidden patterns.

section.title: Schema

example.note: CSS-class queries; missing imports; jest.fn() in vitest project; fireEvent only; no axe; 320-line snapshot.

pattern.description: expect(container).toMatchSnapshot() generated by default in every test
fireEvent.click(...) for an interaction the real user does via mouse + keyboard
